summary: CRITICAL: actions/checkout@v4 must be pinned to full SHA (40 hex), not version tag—task explicitly requires this. cleanup.py is solid (type hints, error handling, clear logic); run_act_tests.py well-structured but references missing fixture files. Deliverable incomplete: no fixtures under fixtures/case_*/, no act-result.txt (required per task), no actionlint validation evidence. Workflow has good structure (set -euo pipefail, least-privilege perms, proper triggers) but INPUT_OVERRIDE_FLAGS (lines 66–67) is complex and fragile. Minor: __import__("datetime").timedelta (line 116) is quirky.
